name: Concordia Maritime AB (publ)
summary: Concordia Maritime AB (publ) operates as a tanker shipping company in Sweden and internationally. It is involved in the shipbuilding, manning, technical, chartering, and commercial operation. The company engages in the transportation of refined oil products, chemicals, and vegetable oils. Its fleet consists of ten P-MAX product tankers, two IMOIIMAX chemical and product tankers, and one suezmax tanker. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden. Concordia Maritime AB (publ) is a subsidiary of Stena Sessan AB.
